message:
fix(runtime): make strace output reading fail-closed with contextual error and add unit tests

Lockstep harness strace output handling:
- Extract strace file reading into dedicated read_strace_output() method
  that returns a proper anyhow error with runtime name and file path context
  instead of silently skipping when the file is missing
- Previously, a missing strace output file would be silently ignored,
  potentially masking real behavioral divergences between runtimes by
  producing an incomplete combined output; now the harness fails closed
  with a descriptive error message including which runtime's strace was
  missing and the expected file path
- Add read_strace_output_reads_existing_file test verifying successful
  read of a valid strace log
- Add read_strace_output_errors_when_file_missing test verifying the
  error message includes both "strace output missing or unreadable for
  runtime node" and the file path for fast triage

Also updates .beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
